channel.title: Aymen.dev Technical Blog
channel.description: Technical writing on DevOps, system resilience, observability, and full-stack engineering.

item.title: Architecting Multi Cloud Resilience: Why OpenTofu and Terragrunt Are Mandatory in 2026
item.description: Why OpenTofu and Terragrunt became the 2026 standard for resilient, multi-cloud infrastructure with predictable environments and provider independence.

item.title: The Execution Layer Breach: Analyzing the March 2026 Hackerbot-Claw CI/CD Compromise
item.description: A deep analysis of the March 2026 hackerbot-claw CI/CD compromise, the exploitation paths used, and concrete DevSecOps hardening mandates.

item.title: From Logs to Logic: Claude's Real-Time Visualization is the Observability Leap DevOps Demanded
Building an AI-Powered Workflow Orchestration Stack: Open WebUI, n8n, Qdrant, and PostgreSQL
item.description: Build a self-hosted AI workflow orchestration stack using Open WebUI, n8n, Qdrant, and PostgreSQL for support automation, knowledge search, and internal AI assistants.

item.title: Beyond the Tutorial: Architecting Web Systems for 99.9% Resilience
item.description: A practical framework for building resilient web systems with GitOps, NGINX, Docker isolation, observability, and Agile execution for 99.9% uptime.

item.title: DevOps on a VPS for Startups: Self-Hosted CI/CD, Docker and Monitoring
item.description: Learn how startups can run DevOps on a VPS with Docker, CI/CD, monitoring, backups, security hardening, and a low-cost path to scale.
